## What Worked

Which workflows or commands worked as expected?

## What Didn't Work

What broke, confused you, or produced unhelpful output?

## Would You Use It Again?

Yes / No / Maybe — and why.

## Would You Pay For It?

Yes / No / Maybe — and under what conditions (pricing, feature set, etc.).

## Environment

- OS:
- Python version:
- SkillLayer version or commit:
- Client used (CLI / Codex / Cursor / Claude Code):

Please do not include private code, secrets, raw repository data, screenshots,
or unreviewed telemetry exports.
